goal: Audit and resolve duplicated card-catalog entries so collection views no longer show repeated cards across active/planned and duplicate legacy sources.
constraints: Do not delete card assets or historical card files; preserve duplicate history via status/notes where needed.
Keep runtime/gameplay card consumption on active cards only.
Preserve minimal, reviewable diffs in existing architecture.
deliverables: Duplicate legacy catalog entries are downgraded so normal collection views no longer show repeated cards.
Collection UI defaults to active cards and excludes archived duplicates from normal filters.
Legacy migration logic avoids re-importing duplicate cards from showcase/cardsDB into content/cards.
Catalog validation catches user-visible duplicate cards before regeneration/finalize.
